description: This file defines a MySQL repository module for managing documents and extracted text, including functions to create, list, retrieve, and update documents and their extracted text in a MySQL database.

methods.name: createDocument
methods.description: Creates a new document record in the database and returns the inserted record.

methods.name: listDocuments
methods.description: Retrieves a list of documents with optional pagination.

methods.name: getDocumentById
methods.description: Fetches a document by its ID.

methods.name: upsertExtractedText
methods.description: Inserts or updates extracted text for a document, keeping history.

methods.name: getLatestExtractedText
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent extracted text for a specific document.

methods.name: getLatestDocumentForUserByCategory
methods.description: Fetches the latest document for a user and category, supporting null userId for anonymous.
